title: pteris decrescens var. parviloba
intro: Pteris decrescens var. parviloba, commonly known as the small-lobed brake fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Pteridaceae. It is native to Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pteris decrescens var. parviloba include the potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
